title: Implement forwarding buffer with backpressure (Python)
description:
Add per-source forwarding buffer to python/src/lichen/routing/router.py or node.py:
- Track packets per source IID (MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2)
- Return backpressure signal when limit exceeded
- Send NACK upstream when full (spec appendix-bufferbloat.md)
close_reason: Implemented ForwardingBuffer class with per-source limits (MAX_FORWARDING_SOURCES=8, MAX_PACKETS_PER_SOURCE=2), LRU eviction, deadline-based expiry, and backpressure signaling. Added to Router as forwarding_buffer attribute. 12 tests covering acceptance, backpressure, eviction, dequeue, expiry, and stats.
